top.slogan: Can the US Election bring you a great trading opportunity? Absolutely.

card-1.head: The Expectations
card-1.text: Last Wednesday the dollar slumped when polls showed Trump leading Clinton. It’s a good hint to how the market might react if the exit polling data show similar results. A Clinton victory is widely seen as more favorable for the US dollar, so traders can expect a bullish trend in that case. And should Trump win, there might be a significant dip in price for the USD.

card-2.head: The Safe Haven
card-2.text: With just one day to go before the Election, the US dollar is getting increasingly volatile. But remember: there’s nothing the markets hate more than uncertainty. That’s why investors might be fleeting to the safe haven assets like the Japanese Yen, increasing its value against the greenback.

cta.warn: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment. The offer is valid on November 8th from 12:00 to 21:00 GMT.
